name: Mempa v. Rhay
question: Does the absence of counsel during a post-trial proceeding for revocation of probation or imposition of deferred sentencing violate the Sixth Amendment as applied to the states by the Fourteenth Amendment?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Sixth Amendment, as applied to the states by the Fourteenth Amendment, requires that the right to counsel extend to the deferred sentencing and revocation of probation stage.
